member.summary: Send control command
member.remarks: Send a control command to the engine. Available commands: - `stt.start` — Start speech-to-text - `stt.stop` — Stop speech-to-text - `engine.shutdown` — Graceful shutdown
member.exception: Thrown when fails to make API call
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IMessagesApi.SendMessageAsync(System.String,OpenVip.Model.Transcription,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send message to agent
member.remarks: Send a voice interaction message to a specific agent. The agent must be connected via SSE (GET endpoint) to receive messages.
member.exception: Thrown when fails to make API call
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IMessagesApi.SendMessageOrDefaultAsync(System.String,OpenVip.Model.Transcription,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send message to agent
member.remarks: Send a voice interaction message to a specific agent. The agent must be connected via SSE (GET endpoint) to receive messages.
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IMessagesApi.SubscribeAgentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to agent messages (SSE)
member.remarks: Server-Sent Events stream for messages to this agent. The SSE connection acts as agent registration — the agent exists as long as this connection is open. When the client disconnects, the agent is automatically de-registered. Reconnect on disconnect. Messages sent while disconnected are lost (ephemeral model). Keepalive comments (`: keepalive`) are sent every 30 seconds if no data.
member.exception: Thrown when fails to make API call
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IMessagesApi.SubscribeAgentOrDefaultAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to agent messages (SSE)
member.remarks: Server-Sent Events stream for messages to this agent. The SSE connection acts as agent registration — the agent exists as long as this connection is open. When the client disconnects, the agent is automatically de-registered. Reconnect on disconnect. Messages sent while disconnected are lost (ephemeral model). Keepalive comments (`: keepalive`) are sent every 30 seconds if no data.
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.summary: The class containing the events

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IStatusApi.GetStatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get engine status
member.remarks: Get the current status of the engine. Returns protocol-level information (connected agents, protocol version) and implementation-specific details in the `platform` object.
member.exception: Thrown when fails to make API call
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IStatusApi.GetStatusOrDefaultAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get engine status
member.remarks: Get the current status of the engine. Returns protocol-level information (connected agents, protocol version) and implementation-specific details in the `platform` object.
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IStatusApi.SubscribeStatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to status changes (SSE)
member.remarks: Server-Sent Events stream that pushes status updates on state transitions. Events are sent when `state`, `connected_agents`, or other discrete fields change. Continuously changing fields (e.g., `uptime_seconds`) do not trigger events. The payload of each event is a `Status` object — the same schema as the `GET /status` response. Keepalive comments (`: keepalive`) are sent every 30 seconds if no events occur. Clients that cannot use SSE should fall back to polling `GET /status`.
member.exception: Thrown when fails to make API call
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.IStatusApi.SubscribeStatusOrDefaultAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to status changes (SSE)
member.remarks: Server-Sent Events stream that pushes status updates on state transitions. Events are sent when `state`, `connected_agents`, or other discrete fields change. Continuously changing fields (e.g., `uptime_seconds`) do not trigger events. The payload of each event is a `Status` object — the same schema as the `GET /status` response. Keepalive comments (`: keepalive`) are sent every 30 seconds if no events occur. Clients that cannot use SSE should fall back to polling `GET /status`.
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.StatusApi.SubscribeStatusOrDefaultAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to status changes (SSE) Server-Sent Events stream that pushes status updates on state transitions. Events are sent when `state`, `connected_agents`, or other discrete fields change. Continuously changing fields (e.g., `uptime_seconds`) do not trigger events. The payload of each event is a `Status` object — the same schema as the `GET /status` response. Keepalive comments (`: keepalive`) are sent every 30 seconds if no events occur. Clients that cannot use SSE should fall back to polling `GET /status`.
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Api.StatusApi.SubscribeStatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to status changes (SSE) Server-Sent Events stream that pushes status updates on state transitions. Events are sent when `state`, `connected_agents`, or other discrete fields change. Continuously changing fields (e.g., `uptime_seconds`) do not trigger events. The payload of each event is a `Status` object — the same schema as the `GET /status` response. Keepalive comments (`: keepalive`) are sent every 30 seconds if no events occur. Clients that cannot use SSE should fall back to polling `GET /status`.
member.exception: Thrown when fails to make API call
member.param: Cancellation Token to cancel the request.

member.name: M:OpenVip.Client.ClientUtils.JsonRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?i)^(application/json|[^;/ \t]+/[^;/ \t]+[+]json)[ \t]*(;.*)?$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [Jj].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [^\t /;] atomically at least once.
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [^\t /;] greedily at least once.
○ Match '+'.
○ Match a character in the set [Jj].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [\t ] greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match ';'.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.
